name: validate_noc
short_description: Generate the block data model of the design and validate NoC
full_help:
validate_noc

Description: 
Generate the block data model of the design and validate NoC

Syntax: 
validate_noc  [-force] [-part <arg>] [-pr_config <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]
              [<fileset>]

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-force]      Force validate design
  [-part]       Target part
  [-pr_config]  Partition configuration to validate
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<fileset>]   Current fileset to validate

Categories: 
Vivado, Design

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
